entries.title: Minecraft 1.21.11 version-change sources
entries.summary: Authoritative version-change evidence should combine NeoForged primers for loader migration notes with misode technical-changes markdown for vanilla data and resource format changes.

metadata.preview:
Minecraft 1.21.10 -> 1.21.11 Mod Migration Primer

This is a high level, non-exhaustive overview on how to migrate your mod from 1.21.10 to 1.21.11. This does not look at any specific mod loader, just the changes to the vanilla classes. All provided names use the official mojang mappings.

This primer is licensed under the [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/), so feel free to use it as a reference and leave a link so that other readers can consume the primer.

If there's any incorrect or missing information, please file an issue on this repository or ping @ChampionAsh5357 in the Neoforged Discord server.

Thank you to:

- @xfacthd for some educated guesses regarding the usage annotations

- @dinnerbone for pointing out gizmos can also be submitted on the server in singleplayer worlds

- @thatgravyboat for pointing out the change in parameter orders for Mth#clampedLerp

Pack Changes

There are a number of user-facing changes that are part of vanilla which are not discussed below that may be relevant to modders. You can find a list of them on [Misode's version changelog](https://misode.github.io/versions/?id=1.22&tab=changelog)

entries.title: misode 1.21.11-pre1 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 94.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 94.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 75.0.

component breaking | The min_reach, max_reach, and hitbox_margin fields have been moved from piercing_weapon and kinetic_weapon components into a new attack_range component.

component | Added attack_range component to enable custom attack range when using the item. Fields: min_range, max_range, hitbox_margin and mob_factor.

tag | Updated #piglin_preferred_weapons item tag to include golden spears.

assets | Textures for leather horse armor item and equipment asset have been split into a tinted base layer and an overlay layer.

assets | Added alpha_cutoff_bias field to texture section of *.mcmeta files to control alpha bias for cutout textures. Can be increased for textures that become too transparent at distance or decreased if too opaque. Only used for lower mips of cutout textures and has no effect on first mip level or other textures.

assets | Added item sprite: leather_horse_armor_overlay.

assets | Added entity texture: entity/equipment/horse_body/leather_overlay.png.

sound | Updated swim sounds for nautilus, baby nautilus, and z

entries.title: misode 1.21.11-pre4 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 94.1.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 94.1.

component | Added min_creative_reach and max_creative_reach fields to attack_range component for creative mode.

entries.title: misode 25w41a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 89.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 89.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 70.0.

network | Minecraft Server Management Protocol version has been increased to 1.1.0.

network | Added server/activity notification to Server Management Protocol, which indicates that a network connection has been initiated. Rate limited to one notification per 30 seconds.

jar | Added ClientFps JFR event.

network | Experience packets that do not change the player's experience progress or level are no longer sent by the server.

command | Added stopwatch command for creating stopwatches that track real time. Stopwatches do not depend on game ticks and only run when the server/world is running.

command | Added execute if|unless stopwatch <id> <range> syntax to compare the elapsed time of a stopwatch with a floating point value range. The stopwatch value is measured in seconds with millisecond accuracy.

component | Added use_effects component to control player behavior when using an item. Fields: can_sprint (boolean, defaults to false) and speed_multiplier (float 0.0 to 1.0, defaults to 0.2).

component | Added minimum_attack_charge compon

entries.title: misode 25w42a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 90.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 90.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 70.1.

network | Minecraft Server Management Protocol now enables authentication from web browsers by passing the token in Sec-WebSocket-Protocol header. Requests authenticating this way are subject to Origin header checks, which requires configuration of allowed origins using management-server-allowed-origins.

command | Resource suggestions now show results in any namespace instead of just within minecraft.

command breaking | Changed stopwatch command syntax. The id argument has been moved after the subcommand. Example: /stopwatch foo:bar create is now /stopwatch create foo:bar.

command | The stopwatch query command now returns the queried value and takes in a new optional scale argument. The returned value will be scaled by that argument and truncated, defaulting to 1 if omitted.

environment-attribute | Added Environment Attributes system, providing a data-driven way to control visual and gameplay effects. Environment Attribute values can be provided by dimensions and biomes, with biomes having higher priority.

environment-attribute | Add

entries.title: misode 25w43a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 91.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 91.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 71.0.

command breaking | World border interpolation is now dependent on game ticks instead of real time. The world border will no longer move when the game is paused and will respect changes made by the /tick command.

command breaking | The worldborder command time argument is now given in ticks instead of seconds.

loot breaking | Changed filtered loot function. The modifier field has been replaced with on_pass and on_fail fields for functions to run when the item_filter predicate passes or fails respectively.

loot | Added discard loot function that replaces any item stack with an empty one. Takes no fields.

enchantment | Added apply_exhaustion enchantment entity effect to apply exhaustion to the targeted entity. Field: amount. Only effective on players.

assets breaking | The darkened_cutout_mipmap field in texture section of *.mcmeta files has been replaced with mipmap_strategy field. Supported values: mean, dark_cutout, cutout, strict_cutout and auto.

assets | All mipmap levels are once again animated for block animated textures.

asset

entries.title: misode 25w44a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 92.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 92.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 72.0.

network breaking | Minecraft Server Management Protocol version has been increased to 2.0.0.

network breaking | In Server Management Protocol typed_game_rule and untyped_game_rule schemas, the value field type has been changed from string to boolean or integer, and now uses the game rule resource location as the key.

network | Added support for KQueue on macOS to improve network connection performance.

command | The worldborder command time argument for setting size can now specify seconds or in-game days using an s or d suffix.

command | The worldborder command time argument for setting warning distance now specifies ticks by default but can also specify seconds or in-game days using an s or d suffix.

gamerule breaking | Game rules have been moved into a registry and renamed from camel case names to resource locations in snake case.

gamerule breaking | The following game rules have been renamed: announceAdvancements to show_advancement_messages, commandBlocksEnabled to command_blocks_work, command_modification_block_limit to max_bl

entries.title: misode 25w45a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 93.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 93.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 73.0.

variant | Zombie nautilus variants can now be data-driven, with entries in the zombie_nautilus_variant folder. The file takes fields model (normal or warm), asset_id, and spawn_conditions.

variant | Added coral zombie nautilus mob variant.

variant | Added spawn condition predicates for variants: biome (checks if entity is spawning in specific biomes), moon_brightness (checks if moon brightness is within range), and structures (checks if entity is spawning in specific structures).

atlas breaking | Item textures were split out of the blocks atlas into a separate new items atlas. Commands that referenced the blocks atlas for item textures now need to reference the items atlas instead.

gamerule | The max_entity_cramming game rule limit has been changed to a minimum of 0.

component | The piercing_weapon and kinetic_weapon components now have bounds on their reach parameters: min_reach (0.0 to 128.0), max_reach (0.0 to 128.0), and hitbox_margin (0.0 to 1.0).

data | Added timelines system, defined in data packs under the timeline registry.

entries.title: misode 25w46a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 93.1.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 93.1.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 74.0.

component | Added food properties to fish bucket items: cod_bucket, salmon_bucket, pufferfish_bucket, and tropical_fish_bucket.

component | Added interact_vibrations field to use_effects component to control whether using the item emits item_interact_start and item_interact_finish game events. Format: boolean, defaults to true.

loot obsolete | Reverted removal of contents as a supported value for the dynamic loot pool entry.

assets breaking | Textures used for still water and lava are now hardcoded to block/water_still and block/lava_still.

assets | The game will now print a warning if any defined sprites in any atlases share a name.

assets breaking | Beacons no longer support translucent textures.

assets | Added gui/container/nautilus texture used for nautilus inventory UI.

assets | Added container/slot/nautilus_armor_inventory UI sprite for nautilus icon used in nautilus inventory UI.

sound | Added entity.zombie_horse.eat sound event.

blockstate | Block model elements can now be rotated around multiple axes. New fields: x, y an
